title: Soulection Radio Show #411 (Jared Jackson Radio)
content:
[Jared Jackson](https://twitter.com/iamjaredjackson) takes over with 2 hours or deep house and garage vibes.
<!--more-->


Follow Jared Jackson on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/thisisjaredjackson), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/iamjaredjackson), and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/thisisjaredjackson/)
